data_in.description: Public tandem MS/MS spectrum dataset associated with Bittremieux et al. 2021 (doi:10.1002/rcm.9153)

data_out.description: Cluster assignment output file produced by falcon command-line tool

domain_knowledge: Feature hashing reduces high-resolution spectra to low-dimensional vectors, enabling efficient nearest neighbor searching on large spectral datasets.
Falcon uses density-based clustering to group spectra into clusters based on pairwise similarity computed via nearest neighbor indexes, avoiding exhaustive O(n²) comparisons.
Python 3.8+ and compatible versions of spectrum-utils are required dependencies; installation via pip ensures correct version pinning.
Output cluster assignments map each spectrum to a cluster identifier, forming the basis for downstream spectral similarity network analysis and metabolite annotation.

direct_checks: verify file exists: check that falcon-ms and spectrum-utils==0.3.5 can be installed via pip without errors
script_runs: execute falcon command-line tool on the Bittremieux et al. 2021 dataset (doi:10.1002/rcm.9153) and confirm exit code is 0
file_exists: verify that cluster assignment output file is produced by the falcon run
file_format_is: confirm output file is a valid structured format (CSV, TSV, or JSON) that can be parsed
row_count_equals: verify output file contains at least 1 row of cluster assignments (non-empty result)
expert_review: Inspect cluster assignment output for semantic correctness: verify that spectrum identifiers are present and cluster IDs are assigned as expected for MS/MS data
Confirm that the number of clusters and cluster size distribution are reasonable given the dataset size and falcon algorithm parameters

task_description: Install falcon-ms and spectrum-utils==0.3.5, then execute the falcon command-line tool on the Bittremieux et al. 2021 public dataset to produce cluster assignments. Verify successful execution and non-empty output.

task_inputs.label: Public tandem MS/MS spectrum dataset (Bittremieux et al. 2021)

task_objective: Install falcon-ms and spectrum-utils==0.3.5, execute falcon on the Bittremieux et al. 2021 dataset, and verify non-empty cluster output is produced without errors.

task_outputs.label: Cluster assignment output file from falcon

title: Reproduce the end-to-end falcon clustering run on the Bittremieux et al. 2021 dataset
uncertainty_notes: This card was generated by the LLM-assisted pipeline and needs scientific expert review.
Each TracedClaim's evidence_span has been substring-checked against its source section; see logs/llm_calls.jsonl and capsules/<task_id>/quality_report.json for groundedness results.
workflow_description: 1. Install falcon-ms and spectrum-utils==0.3.5 using pip on a Python 3.8+ environment. 2. Retrieve or locate the publicly available tandem MS/MS spectrum dataset associated with Bittremieux et al. 2021. 3. Run the falcon command-line tool on the dataset to perform spectrum clustering via feature hashing, nearest neighbor indexing, and density-based clustering, producing a cluster assignment output file. 4. Verify that the tool executed without errors and the output file is non-empty.
